{{Quote|Professional racers like myself travel wherever the purses are highest.|Zoriis, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|translated=1|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Zoriis Bafka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] with [[Color/Legends|green skin]], who was one of the professional [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] racers [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] met in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] in [[3956 BBY]]. She considered [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] a business, and swoop racers like herself the "product." She used to race under a different name when she was younger, but her career was not spectacular at that time. Revan was successful in beating Bafka's time in a swoop race.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player takes the dark side path in the game, they can insult or threaten Zoriis. Insults will result in her leaving, and threats can result in her giving you [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].
